query: Show top 5 movies by IMDb rating.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating, m.votes, m.runtime, d.director_name FROM Movie m LEFT JOIN Director d ON m.director_id = d.director_id ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 5

query: Find drama movies with rating above 8.5.
generated_sql: SELECT m.* FROM Movie m JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE g.genre = 'Drama' AND m.imdb_rating > 8.5 LIMIT 50

query: List movies directed by Christopher Nolan ordered by rating.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating, m.votes, m.gross, m.runtime FROM Movie m JOIN Director d ON m.director_id = d.director_id WHERE d.director_name = 'Christopher Nolan' ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: How many movies are there in each genre?
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, COUNT(mg.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Genre g LEFT JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON g.genre_id = mg.genre_id GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.genre ORDER BY movie_count DESC

query: Which actor appears in the most movies in this dataset?
generated_sql: SELECT a.actor_name, COUNT(ma.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Actor a JOIN Movie_Actor ma ON a.actor_id = ma.actor_id GROUP BY a.actor_id, a.actor_name ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 1

query: Find the average IMDb rating of movies released after 2010 by genre.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, AVG(m.imdb_rating) AS avg_imdb_rating FROM Movie m JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE m.year > 2010 GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.genre ORDER BY avg_imdb_rating DESC

query: Give me science fiction movies from 2010 to 2020 sorted by votes.
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.certificate, m.runtime, m.imdb_rating, m.meta_score, m.votes, m.gross, m.overview, m.poster_link, m.director_id FROM Movie m JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE g.genre = 'Science Fiction' AND m.year BETWEEN 2010 AND 2020 ORDER BY m.votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Show top 10 highest grossing movies with their directors.
generated_sql: SELECT m.title, m.gross, d.director_name FROM Movie m JOIN Director d ON m.director_id = d.director_id WHERE m.gross IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.gross DESC LIMIT 10

query: Recommend 5 emotional drama movies with high rating.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating, m.votes, m.overview FROM Movie m JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE g.genre = 'Drama' ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 5

query: I like mind-bending sci-fi movies similar to Inception.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating, m.runtime, m.overview, d.director_name FROM Movie m JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id LEFT JOIN Director d ON m.director_id = d.director_id WHERE g.genre = 'Sci-Fi' AND m.title != 'Inception' ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 10
